Related Entities

  • hospital MEDINA HOSPITAL 5-star overall rating
  • hospital LODI COMMUNITY HOSPITAL
  • snf LIFE CARE CENTER OF MEDINA 3-star, 156 beds
  • snf ALTERCARE OF WADSWORTH 3-star, 90 beds
  • snf SANCTUARY WADSWORTH 5-star, 79 beds
  • snf PEARLVIEW REHAB & WELLNESS CTR 4-star, 68 beds
  • snf MEDINA CENTER FOR REHABILITATION AND NURSING 2-star, 80 beds
  • snf MEDINA BSD OPCO LLC 4-star, 60 beds
  • snf WILLOWOOD CARE CENTER OF BRUNSWICK 4-star, 100 beds
  • snf SAMARITAN CARE CENTER AND VILLA 3-star, 56 beds
  • snf WADSWORTH POINTE 5-star, 64 beds
  • snf WESTERN RESERVE MASONIC COMM 5-star, 50 beds
  • snf AVENUE AT MEDINA 4-star, 70 beds
  • snf BRUNSWICK POINTE TRANSITIONAL CARE 5-star, 91 beds
  • snf CHAMPION CREEK HEALTH AND REHABILITATION 90 beds
Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-12. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
